retry_reason: The put operation always succeeds (no failure); retrying would cause a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a scmi_xfer. When the last reference is dropped (refcount reaches zero), the transfer is cleaned up: pending state is removed, the token is cleared, the transfer is unhashed, and it is returned to the free list for reuse. The caller must not use the xfer after calling this function, as the reference is released and the object may be recycled. No return value to check; the operation is unconditional.
